creator: nik@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I committed (with some minor mods) my own patches. 

<Third rock from the sun> 
"You're the man" 

"No man, *you're* da' man." 

"No way, you da' man." 

"I'm the Most High Commander, and when I say 'You are the man', you 
are the man." 

"Oh, OK. I'm da' man." 

</>
